assertions.assertion: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertions.evidence: Branch Operations step 1: 'git checkout TC-9005' and 'git pull'. Explicitly states 'The target branch is TC-9005... not main'

assertions.assertion: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertions.evidence: Branch Operations step 2: 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. Explicitly: 'The task branch is named after the Jira issue ID (TC-9205)... This is distinct from the target branch name (TC-9005)'

assertions.assertion: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertions.evidence: Pre-Implementation Inspection lists all 3: m0001_initial/mod.rs, migration/src/lib.rs, and entity/src/advisory.rs

assertions.assertion: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertions.evidence: Commit message: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' with 'Implements TC-9205' footer

assertions.assertion: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertions.evidence: Target Branch section: 'TC-9005 (extracted from the task description's Target Branch section)' with quoted task description
